purpose: Deploy trigger after adding real root fallback pages for the Dark Speculation Lab and forum.
deployIntent: Build and deploy the complete upgraded Cloudflare site from current main.
criticalFix: dark-speculation-lab.html and dark-speculation-forum.html now exist as real root files as well as generated build outputs, so Cloudflare can serve them even if the generator output is not picked up.
includedUpgrades: branded PDF mini-book covers and table of contents
auto-updated download PDF index and flagship PDF collection
Dark Speculation Lab root fallback page
Dark Speculation forum root fallback page
Link Audit builds generated site before auditing
forumNote: Forum page loads and has local fallback. Public shared posting requires Cloudflare Worker routes /forum-feed and /submit-forum-post plus FORUM_POSTS KV binding.
expected: Fresh push should trigger connected Cloudflare build/deploy against current main.
